subject: Account Dashboard Connection Issue
description: Customer reported they cannot connect to their personal workspace dashboard. Throws error 504.

subject: Billing plan upgrade query
description: Customer wants to upgrade from Basic to Pro plan. Requesting a detailed breakdown of features and pricing.

subject: App navigation is confusing
description: User found the navigation flow in the mobile app to be unintuitive. Suggested adding bottom navigation tabs for key features.

subject: Cannot reset password via email
description: Password reset emails are not being received. Checked spam folder as well. This has been ongoing for 3 days.

subject: General onboarding call completed
description: Completed a 30-minute onboarding walkthrough with the customer. Covered key features and answered all questions satisfactorily.
